original: A plasma katana is the fearsome offspring of a monofilament blade and a star’s burning heart. Switched off, it’s little more than a metal knife with a strangely long hilt. When powered on, it projects a corona of carefully shaped plasma several feet long around the smaller, solid blade, capable of slicing through metal as easily as it burns flesh.

The thraggen Rusher is a statuesque amazon, the pinnacle of her species’ tendency towards towering muscle-babes with heaving big tits and thighs fit to crush skulls. Mhorgenn’s strapped up in a black leather jacket that’s entirely too tight around her rock-hard biceps, and her tight leather pants leave nothing about her growing battle-bulge to the imagination. A messy ash-colored ponytail is pulled back behind a VR visor she was using to manually work her heavy mech, and her betusked face is decorated with warpaint and black lipstick. She’s drawn a crackling energy sword, and though it’s a thin, elegant blade, she’s swinging it around in a two-fisted berserkergang.
Mhorgenn throws her head back and moans, “Ahhh yeah, that’s the stuff.” Her skin flushes slightly as her injuries heal.
The orc shakes her head. “You’re not breaking my baby that easily.” She deploys a repair drone to fix her damaged loader!
The thraggen’s finally had the wind knocked out of her, reeling against a nearby box and struggling to contain her enormous war-boner.

The thraggen Rusher is a statuesque amazon, the pinnacle of her species’ tendency towards towering muscle-babes with heaving big tits and thighs fit to crush skulls. Mhorgenn’s strapped up in a black leather jacket that’s entirely too tight around her rock-hard biceps, and her tight leather pants leave nothing about her growing battle-bulge to the imagination. A messy ash-colored ponytail is pulled back behind a VR visor she was using to manually work her heavy mech, and her betusked face is decorated with warpaint and black lipstick. She’s drawn a crackling energy sword, and though it’s a thin, elegant blade, she’s swinging it around in a two-fisted berserkergang.
The loader mech’s gone face-down on the factory floor, showering sparks everywhere.
The captain’s mech’s similar to the heavy power loader Captain Khorgan used back on Tarkus, vaguely shaped like a Terran ape and wielding clamping arms strong enough to rip a tank apart.
It thunders forward unrelentingly, clamping its claws with malicious intent.
The thing’s gone berserk without Mhorgenn to control it, hurling itself at you with ferocious abandon!
